description_long: This is a striking, low-profile sports car with a vivid orange and black color scheme, featuring an aerodynamic body and aggressive styling. The car is equipped with a large rear wing spoiler, prominent side air intakes, and a sculpted hood with black accents. Its roof is fitted with a mounted device resembling a high-tech camera or weapon, adding a unique, tactical appearance. The wheels are large, black, and multi-spoked, complementing the car's performance-oriented design. The windows are tinted, and the car sits very close to the ground, emphasizing its speed and agility. The rear features a pronounced diffuser and dual exhausts, further enhancing its sporty character.
description: A vivid orange and black, low-slung sports car with a large rear wing, aggressive aerodynamic features, and a mounted device on the roof. It has black multi-spoke wheels and a sleek, performance-driven design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, low nose, sculpted hood with black accents, and aggressive headlights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the aerodynamic profile, large rear wing, side air intakes, and the roof-mounted device.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the prominent rear wing, diffuser, dual exhausts, and taillights integrated into the black rear fascia.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same aerodynamic lines, black wheels, and roof-mounted device.
